title: Global Clean Power Alliance: finance mission update (November 2025)
body: "At COP30, the United Kingdom and Brazil have jointly launched key deliverables for the Global Clean Power Alliance’s finance mission: clean energy action plans for finance mission partners and a global roadmap for high-quality energy investment planning in emerging markets.   The Global Clean Power Alliance Finance Mission was launched at the G20 summit by Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer and President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva of Brazil in November 2024. The GCPA Finance Mission aims to scale clean energy investments in Emerging Markets and Developing Economies (EMDEs) in line with the Global Stocktake goals of tripling renewable energy capacity and doubling energy efficiency globally by 2030.  "
